title: Determination of Lighting Power Density
full_text:
4.3.2.2 Determination of Lighting Power Density
Determination of Lighting Power Density
1) The lighting power density for a space, pi, in W/m2, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: A_{\text{NDL},i} = A_i - A_{\text{DL},i}] where Pi = lighting power in the space, in W, and Ai = gross interior floor area of that space, in m2.

sentences.text: The lighting power density for a space, pi, in W/m2, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: A_{\text{NDL},i} = A_i - A_{\text{DL},i}] where Pi = lighting power in the space, in W, and Ai = gross interior floor area of that space, in m2.
